summary: Regression + new features verified for iter100 (13-module route extraction + hybrid cookie auth + password policy + welcome-discount stats). 33/33 backend tests PASS. Frontend login → dashboard → Settings/العملاء (welcome-coupon-stats visible with 4 chips) → Reports all working.

minor.issue: Returned 500 due to leftover seed order (expattr-order-a-*) with missing order_number/order_type. Deleted stale doc; endpoint now 200. Seed script bug, not the refactor.
Uses DB_NAME env default 'test_database' but backend uses 'maestro_pos'. Must run with DB_NAME=maestro_pos else seed writes to wrong DB and totals show 0. Fix: read DB_NAME from /app/backend/.env.

integration_issues.issue: Two 403 console errors on background API calls (non-blocking; page renders fully).

action_items: Fix seed_expense_attribution_test.py to use DB_NAME from backend/.env (currently defaults to 'test_database' but backend uses 'maestro_pos').
Add required order_number + order_type fields when the seed creates test orders (currently causes /api/orders 500).
Investigate 2 x 403 console errors on Settings page for polish (not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 16,861 lines is still very large despite extracting 13 modules — recommend continued modularization.
shift_expense_query with created_by fallback correctly isolates cashiers (verified live: A=15000, B=5000, no cross-mixing).
Hybrid cookie/bearer auth verified: HttpOnly cookie set on login, cleared on logout; /auth/me works with either credential type.
seed_data_creation: Re-ran seed_expense_attribution_test.py with DB_NAME=maestro_pos. Cleaned stale expattr-order-a-* order and 'NEWEXP TEST' expense from previous iterations to unblock /api/orders and get accurate 15000 total.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_refactor_iter100.py covers auth+cookie+logout, super_admin (5 endpoints), all 13 extracted route modules, core POS regression, password policy (create+reset), welcome-discount stats RBAC (admin 200 / cashier 403), shift expense isolation, expenses POST. Seed for expense-attribution requires DB_NAME=maestro_pos env var when running python3 seed_expense_attribution_test.py.
